tools.name: copyrights.getMapVersionNumberCopyrightsCaptionFormat
tools.description: This API returns copyright captions for the map service.

tools.name: copyrights.getMapVersionNumberCopyrightsFormat
tools.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the whole world.

tools.name: copyrights.getMapVersionNumberCopyrightsMinLonMinLatMaxLonMaxLatFormat
tools.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for a specific bounding box.

tools.name: copyrights.getMapVersionNumberCopyrightsZoomXYFormat
tools.description:
The Copyrights API returns copyright information for
the Maps API Raster Tile Service in JSON, JSONP, or XML format.
This call returns copyright information for the a specific map tile.

tools.name: raster.getMapVersionNumberStaticimage
tools.description:
The Static Image service renders a rectangular raster image
in the style, size, and zoom level specified. The image can be requested
using either a center point plus width and height or a bounding box.

tools.name: raster.getMapVersionNumberTileLayerStyleZoomXYFormat
tools.description: The Maps API Raster Service delivers raster tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.

tools.name: vector.getMapVersionNumberTileLayerStyleZoomXYPbf
tools.description: The Maps API Vector Service delivers vector tiles, which are representations of square sections of map data.

tools.name: wmsWmts.getCapabilities
tools.description:
The GetCapabilities call is part of TomTom's implementation of version 1.1.1
the Web Map Service (WMS). It provides descriptions of the other calls
that are available in the implementation.

tools.name: wmsWmts.getMap
tools.description:
The GetMap call implements the Web Map Service 1.1.1 standard
to access TomTom raster map tiles. This service is described
in the response to the GetCapabilities API call.

tools.name: wmsWmts.getMapVersionNumberWmtsKeyWmtsVersionWmtsCapabilitiesXml
tools.description: The WMTS GetCapabilities call implements version 1.0.0 of the Web Map Tile Service (WMTS) standard. It returns metadata that allows compatible calling systems to construct calls to TomTom's raster map tile service. See the documentation for more information on WMTS.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
